Section 01

Executive summary

Lead with the conclusion. State the single most important takeaway here in one line, then let the evidence slides support it.

Section 01 · Summary

Where we stand & where to focus

Trend — last 4 cycles
Source · grain · date range · filters
Top categories
Score vs. benchmark
Category A
92+8pp
Category B
88+6pp
Category C
84+4pp
Category D
76−2pp
To celebrate

Retention — global standout; the value proposition is clearly understood. Consistency across every benchmark. Keep reinforcing what is working.

Where to focus

Reward perception — despite a high overall score, comments flag a gap. Positioning needs clearer, more transparent criteria. Prioritize a 90-day plan with measurable checkpoints.

Source: your_gold_table · grain: respondent · 2026 · filters: none — TODO real values

Section 04 · Comments

What people value & would change

📝 Reading note: quotes are representative of frequent themes in open responses — anonymized, not edited. TODO: paste real, de-identified excerpts.

What they value most

"Short, representative excerpt that captures a recurring positive theme from the open-ended responses."

CultureAutonomyBelonging

What they would change

"Short, representative excerpt that captures a recurring critical theme — phrased constructively."

RewardClarityProcess
So what — and next

Three moves from here

1 · Act

Recommended action + owner + timeline.

2 · Measure

The metric that confirms the action worked.

3 · Revisit

When we re-check and the decision it informs.
